## Summary

- describe the change
- explain why it is needed

## Related issues

- link the issue, if one exists

## Validation

- list the commands, scripts, or manual checks you ran

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change scoped and reviewable
- [ ] I updated docs or generated artifacts when needed
- [ ] I did not include secrets, tokens, or local-only workspace files
- [ ] I am comfortable licensing this contribution under Apache-2.0
